goal: The poster/share page should ALWAYS show a 'Back to Homepage' link, in every state
done: share.js init() now sets #backToReading to 'Back to Homepage' / 'กลับหน้าแรก' -> homepage ('/' or '/th/') ONCE early, before the payload branch, so it shows in success, loading, AND no-payload-error states (the error path previously set a broken 'Back to reading' -> /reading.html; removed). Removed the duplicate per-path blocks. share/index.html: dropped the hidden attr so it renders even pre-JS.
verified: Local (chrome-devtools): /share/ with NO payload -> #backToReading visible, text 'Back to Homepage', href '/'.
